title: Welcome to JavaBean - start here ?
body:
Welcome aboard! This is the home base for **JavaBean for Admin2** ÔÇö free theming for Grav 2's Admin2 panel.

### Quick links
- **Landing page:** https://javabean.gravmud.site
- **Repo:** https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2
- **Latest release:** https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2/releases/latest

### Install
Once we're on GPM:
```bash
bin/gpm install grav-javabean-admin2
```

Until then:
```bash
bin/gpm direct-install https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2/releases/download/1.0.0/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2.zip
```

Enable the plugin in Admin2, pick a preset, tweak in **Paint Shop** if you want.

### Where to hang out in Discussions
| Category | Use it for |
|----------|------------|
| **Announcements** | Releases & news |
| **Q&A** | Install help, bugs, how-to |
| **Ideas** | Preset requests, feature ideas |
| **Show and tell** | Screenshots of your cockpit |
| **Polls** | Settle important debates (like best preset) |

Grab a mug. Make Admin2 yours. Ôÿò

title: Preset & feature ideas - what should JavaBean brew next?
body:
We shipped **twelve presets** in 1.0.0 ÔÇö but the Paint Shop never closes.

### Preset ideas we're curious about
- More **retro terminal** / phosphor greens
- **High-contrast accessibility** pairs
- **Brand kits** (Grav orange, sunset, ocean, forestÔÇª)
- **Seasonal** limited editions (Halloween, solstice, etc.)
- **Mono-only** cockpits for the purists

### Feature ideas on the table
- Export/import custom theme JSON
- Community preset sharing
- More font slots or local font support
- Per-user theme overrides in multi-admin setups

**Drop your wish below.** Tell us the vibe, colors, fonts, or Admin2 screens you want themed. Screenshots and mockups welcome.

If enough people want the same thing, we'll prioritize it for the next release. Ôÿò

title: Q&A - install, presets, Paint Shop, troubleshooting
body:
Stuck? Confused? Just want to know if JavaBean plays nice with your setup? **Ask here.**

### Common starting points
**Requirements:** Grav 2.0+, admin2, api plugins enabled.

**Manual install:**
```bash
bin/gpm direct-install https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2/releases/download/1.0.0/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2.zip
```

**Docs / demos:** https://javabean.gravmud.site

### Good things to include in your question
- Grav version (`bin/grav --version`)
- PHP version
- Whether you're on Admin2 (not legacy admin)
- What you expected vs. what happened
- Screenshots if it's a visual thing

For **bugs**, you can also open an [issue](https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2/issues) ÔÇö but casual questions belong right here.

No dumb questions. Only unpainted cockpits. Ôÿò

title: JavaBean for Admin2 1.0.0 is live Ôÿò
body:
## We shipped 1.0.0

**Site:** https://javabean.gravmud.site
**Release:** https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2/releases/tag/1.0.0
**GPM request:** https://github.com/getgrav/grav/issues/4100

JavaBean for Admin2 is free Admin2 theming for Grav 2 ÔÇö twelve preset cockpits, Paint Shop, fourteen-font catalog, Andy appearance sync, and REST API endpoints.

### What's in the cup
- 12 presets with paired light/dark token maps
- Paint Shop ÔÇö accent, density, typography, corners, custom CSS
- 14 fonts (sans, serif, mono) via Google Fonts
- Andy Admin2 appearance sync
- Menubar links to the GravMUD ecosystem

### Install (manual until GPM lists us)
```bash
bin/gpm direct-install https://github.com/GravMUD/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2/releases/download/1.0.0/grav-plugin-grav-javabean-admin2.zip
```

Requires **Grav 2.0**, **admin2**, and **api**.

Questions? **Q&A**. Preset wishlist? **Ideas**. Screenshots? **Show and tell**.

ÔÇö FutureVision Labs ┬À Team DC ┬À GravMUD

title: Which JavaBean preset is YOUR cockpit? Ôÿò
body:
Time to settle it. **Twelve presets** shipped in 1.0.0 ÔÇö which one are you flying?

Preview them all: https://javabean.gravmud.site

### Vote by replying with your pick:
- **JavaBean Classic**
- **Backenders Amber**
- **WWWeed Emerald**
- **Team DC Synthwave**
- **GoGrav! Rally**
- **Grav Cathedral**
- **Midnight Ops**
- **Mambo Desktop**
- **Mud Bazaar**
- **EvvyTink Terminal**
- **Nordic Frost**
- **High Contrast**

Reply with the preset name (or number from the site). Tell us **why** ÔÇö bonus points for screenshots in **Show and tell**.

*(Native GitHub poll widget coming soon ÔÇö API doesn't support poll creation yet, so we're doing it old-school.)*

title: Show us your JavaBean cockpit ­ƒô©
body:
Got JavaBean installed? **We want to see it.**

Post screenshots of your Admin2 cockpit ÔÇö preset picks, Paint Shop tweaks, custom CSS experiments, the whole vibe.

### How to share
1. Install JavaBean (see **Welcome** or **Announcements**)
2. Screenshot your Admin2 panel
3. Drop it here with your preset name + any Paint Shop notes

### Inspiration
Browse all twelve presets live: https://javabean.gravmud.site

The best setups might inspire the next official preset. Ôÿò­ƒô©
